title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-29
body: Queue triaged (6 reports). Actions taken: BANNED spam_wave_42 (phishing links in multiple channels), BANNED toxic_runner (repeated harassment of newcomers), WARNED bot_like_user_77 (suspicious automated replies). No action on 3 reports: trusted_helper dispute (protected role), low-severity formatting issue, and a false-positive report against a core maintainer. Community safety remains a priority — thank you for reporting.
